title: OrganiGram Holdings Inc (OGI) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Inc Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Improved Margins. Period: Q3 2024 (ended June 30, 2024). Revenue and Earnings: Net revenue increased by 25% year over year and over 9% sequentially. The company reported revenue of $30.01 million. OrganiGram Holdings reported earnings per share of 2 cents, which was above the analyst estimate for EPS of -5 cents. Margins and Operations: Gross margin improved to 36% from 19% in the prior year, a 17 percentage point increase. SG&A expenses decreased by 22% to $14.8 million from $19 million in the prior year period. Canadian Business Performance: Canadian recreational business in Q3 grew 25% year over year. Operational Highlights: Harvested dried flower of 21,420 kilograms, a 15% increase compared to the prior year period, with average yield of 185 grams per plant, a 28% increase year over year. Realized approximately $2.7 million in cost savings in Q3, with a fiscal year-to-date total of $7.9 million. Earnings call held August 13, 2024.
